scripts.build: npm run typecheck && npm run build:all
scripts.build:all: npm run build --workspace=artifacts/api-server && npm run build --workspace=artifacts/mockup-sandbox && npm run build --workspace=artifacts/swebtools
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --workspace=artifacts/api-server && npm install --workspace=artifacts/mockup-sandbox && npm install --workspace=artifacts/swebtools && npm install --workspace=lib/api-client-react && npm install --workspace=lib/api-spec && npm install --workspace=lib/api-zod && npm install --workspace=lib/db && npm install --workspace=scripts
